name: Chicken Scampi W/Linguini
recipeIngredient: 1 pound boneless skinless chicken breast halves
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse the chicken and pat dry. Cut into 1-inch pieces.
2. Dip chicken in egg.
3. Roll in a mixture of bread crumbs, salt, and pepper.
4. Heat oil in a large frying pan. Sauté chicken in the oil until breadcrumbs are golden brown. Remove chicken to a warm platter.
5. Wipe skillet clean with a paper towel. Melt butter or margarine in the skillet.
6. Add garlic, lemon juice, salt, and pepper; mix well.
7. Toss chicken in sauce to coat. Spoon chicken and sauce over linguini tossed with butter or margarine.
8. Sprinkle with parsley. Garnish with lemon wedges.
